title: Variant
description: A purchasable variant of a product with specific option selections.

id.description: Global ID (GID) uniquely identifying this variant. Used as item.id in checkout.

sku.description: Business-assigned identifier for inventory and fulfillment.

type.description: Barcode standard. Well-known values: UPC, EAN, ISBN, GTIN, JAN.

barcodes.description: Industry-standard product identifiers for cross-reference and correlation.

description.description: Variant description in one or more formats.

categories.description: Variant categories with optional taxonomy identifiers.

list_price.description: List price before discounts (for strikethrough display).

unit_price.description: Price per standard unit of measurement. MAY be omitted when unit pricing does not apply.

amount.description: Unit price in ISO 4217 minor units. Business MUST return precomputed unit price value: (variant.price / measure.value) * reference.value.

reference.description: Denominator for unit price display (e.g., per 100ml, per 1kg).

available.description: Whether this variant can be purchased. See status for fulfillment details.

status.description: Qualifies available with fulfillment state. Well-known values: `in_stock`, `backorder`, `preorder`, `out_of_stock`, `discontinued`.

quantity.description: Current stock quantity. Business MAY omit if inventory tracking is not supported or if exact counts are confidential.

low_stock_threshold.description: Business-defined threshold below which the variant is considered low stock. When quantity is at or below this value, platforms SHOULD surface low-stock messaging to the buyer.

restock_at.description: Estimated restock date (RFC 3339). Business SHOULD provide when status is `out_of_stock` or `backorder` and a restock date is known.

available.description: Whether the variant is available at this location.

status.description: Location-level availability status. Same well-known values as variant-level status.

locations.description: Per-location availability for multi-location businesses. Enables agents to guide buyers to locations where the item is in stock.

options.description: Option values that define this variant (e.g., Color: Blue, Size: Large).

media.description: Variant media (images, videos, 3D models). First item is the featured media for listings.

tags.description: Variant tags for categorization and search.

metadata.description: Business-defined custom data extending the standard variant model.

seller.description: Optional seller context for this variant.
